name: Cory Booker
subject: I just got off the debate stage in Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- I was proud to stand up on the debate stage tonight and share our vision for this country. Right now, and every day that goes by, people are starting to tune in a little more closely to this race. For an underdog campaign like ours, we won't get this moment back. **Your donation tonight is about so much more than the money. It's saying you're ready to roll up your sleeves to help bring people together to beat Donald Trump and get back to work for our country.** **[Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can tonight and help build the grassroots campaign it'll take to win?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190912_CB_20190912-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for giving me the chance to represent you in front of the nation. I hope I made you proud. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190912_CB_20190912-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Statement on Democratic Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Democrats take the Stage in Houston to Attack our Values**

Friend,

Tonight, ten Democratic candidates for President took the stage in Houston and attacked our values without relent. They advocated for policies that will cause severe economic damage to our community, including spending trillions in taxpayer funding to implement the Green New Deal. We cannot afford to let these dangerous proposals become reality.

Just this week, even so-called moderate, Joe Biden reiterated his support to end fossil fuels, the lifeblood of Houston’s economy.

Each of these candidates are working to ensure that middle-class Houstonians face job losses, wage cuts and government controlled healthcare. This is the antithesis of what makes Texas great. Texans know when we embrace capitalism, individualism, free enterprise and limited government, that our economy grows and wages grow with it.

I’m running for Congress to protect our way of life from a Democratic Party moving radically to the left. The performances on the debate stage tonight made it clear that if we don’t stand up now, our city, our state and our Nation will be fundamentally changed forever.

Sincerely,
Wesley Parish Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ee857bfaaec74df79fe35d9398c47d12&_e=4sfe19VYFeF8kwpaTkpiqnMa8XugoG1PR_YEXiL0AA1NsUsY2JaAyWFb7JbRmZedEKdh2MktNG3SnI3GVvV_u9J7H6Q4wtCmriAv9HmIZ9kU1aYujsS7ZdSdtBAHeCu_Gq-UTkds1Wvm_v52G6EkkIxrySfTJ7IBbuJrdD-MOEJxJv6Cj1gxgxO8zgLflON3rL7j4A8qDcZzq6E9dhWqZhrsgcbydokcmTscedSgq9bpjPWq-ndmZvSad7w4vn-XM-JZAOaIkMga-EsDHvm7u3aNxXC3xGE1kicdX3Y3pGg%3D)****

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Hey, let’s talk about tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is the biggest moment of the campaign. Can you rush $10 or more before midnight? | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl) Friend -- I just stepped off the stage tonight and couldn’t be more fired up. More people than ever are tuned in to the overwhelming change Humanity First policies can bring to this country. And they will see, when we give Freedom Dividends to 10 Americans, the effect this will have on their lives. Everything you’re doing is paying off. And I could not be more proud to be your candidate. **But here’s the truth: The media, establishment, and everyone watching will use what we fundraise in the next 24 hours to measure the strength of our campaign. So we need you to give it all you can TONIGHT.** [ This is the biggest moment of the campaign. Friend, can you rush $10 or more before midnight? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8055?amount=10&t=2&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8049?t=3&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8050?t=4&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8051?t=5&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)

---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8053?t=7&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8054?t=8&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
---
We’ve reached a major milestone, but we can’t lose sight of our goal to get to the White House. It is crucial that we leverage this moment to reach the next level.
Let’s keep pushing. Let’s show our fellow Americans who should go up against Trump in 2020. Let’s let everyone know we’re here to win.
[ Rush $10 before midnight and let’s take this fight all the way to the White House.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8055?amount=10&t=9&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
Proud to be your candidate,
\- Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8055?t=10&akid=262%2E377263%2EKdVkhl)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm deeply grateful to all of you for being in this fight with me. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d7a/45c30650/13041d16b/6688fab8/3739869875/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

I'm deeply grateful to all of you for being in this fight with me.

I'm continually inspired by your stories, your concerns, and why you chose to be a part of this movement. And I'm more committed than ever to making sure that the big, structural change that we're fighting for becomes a reality.

But the only way we can win is to build a grassroots movement -- person by person, community by community, state by state -- that is ready to fight for a Washington that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well connected.

Your voice is powerfully important in this fight. With just a couple of weeks until a crucial fundraising deadline, I need your help to continue fighting.

[**So I'm asking you: Can you chip in for the first time?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d7a/45c30650/13041d16b/6688fabd/3739869875/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozOUZfREVCX1RZRV9FXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ39F_DEB_TYE_E_20190912_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Our presidential field lacks foreign policy experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I talked to Paul Steinhauser of** the Concord Monitor ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9894940/98607640/-211170317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzY0NjI0ZC0wZGQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKznEX92TMZKx7QrKqftQDlwMw2frZy-9UQ41se_5Es=&emci=23cc478f-b7d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=1c64624d-0dd6-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)) during my week-long trip to the Granite State.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9894941/98607646/-211170317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzY0NjI0ZC0wZGQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKznEX92TMZKx7QrKqftQDlwMw2frZy-9UQ41se_5Es=&emci=23cc478f-b7d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=1c64624d-0dd6-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)**
I explained to the _Monitor _exactly why I'm running: **"If there’s ever a moment we need someone who can unite this country, it is today or we’re not going to meet those challenges abroad or pass policies at home -- and that’s why I got in."**
The Concord Monitor went on to explain I wanted “to ‘secure' the beachhead of Iowa... then move off the beach” to New Hampshire.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9894942/98607654/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzY0NjI0ZC0wZGQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKznEX92TMZKx7QrKqftQDlwMw2frZy-9UQ41se_5Es=&refcode=em09132019nh)**
The Eagle-Tribune also [talks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9894943/98607663/-567446859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzY0NjI0ZC0wZGQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKznEX92TMZKx7QrKqftQDlwMw2frZy-9UQ41se_5Es=&emci=23cc478f-b7d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=) about **the second reason I entered the race**, during my visit to Salem:** ** "Lucy Gagnon of Salem and Kay Galloway of Atkinson noted the **lack of foreign policy by others in the 2020 presidential race** after hearing retired Navy Vice Adm. Joe Sestak make his pitch to be the next commander in chief at a Salem home during a campaign stop... Sestak talked about how he would **build international relationships back up, through rejoining the Paris Agreement on climate change and building on other treaties. Impressed with his knowledge, Salem voters were intrigued **with the candidate in the already flooded primary field."

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9894944/98607677/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzY0NjI0ZC0wZGQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKznEX92TMZKx7QrKqftQDlwMw2frZy-9UQ41se_5Es=&refcode=em09132019nh)**
**As you will have seen on the debate stage, there's a serious lack of foreign policy and national security experience in this race.** If you believe we need a Commander-in-Chief who understands the power of our diplomacy, our economy, and our ideals, as well as that of our military — including the limitations of it — and that we must **convene the world under U.S. leadership if we are to face the defining challenges of our time, _then please contribute_.**
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

clean_body: Peter, I talked to Paul Steinhauser of the Concord Monitor () during my week-long trip to the Granite State. I explained to the Monitor exactly why I'm running: "If there’s ever a moment we need someone who can unite this country, it is today or we’re not going to meet those challenges abroad or pass policies at home -- and that’s why I got in." The Concord Monitor went on to explain I wanted “to ‘secure' the beachhead of Iowa... then move off the beach” to New Hampshire. The Eagle-Tribune also = about the second reason I entered the race, during my visit to Salem: "Lucy Gagnon of Salem and Kay Galloway of Atkinson noted the lack of foreign policy by others in the 2020 presidential race after hearing retired Navy Vice Adm. Joe Sestak make his pitch to be the next commander in chief at a Salem home during a campaign stop... Sestak talked about how he would build international relationships back up, through rejoining the Paris Agreement on climate change and building on other treaties. Impressed with his knowledge, Salem voters were intrigued with the candidate in the already flooded primary field." As you will have seen on the debate stage, there's a serious lack of foreign policy and national security experience in this race. If you believe we need a Commander-in-Chief who understands the power of our diplomacy, our economy, and our ideals, as well as that of our military — including the limitations of it — and that we must convene the world under U.S. leadership if we are to face the defining challenges of our time, then please contribute. Respectfully, Joe Sestak Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in Philadelphia on Wednesday, September 25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Edward F. Chacker, Esq. and Michael T. Van Der Veen, Esq.
Cordially invite you to a Fundraiser Reception on Wednesday, September 25, to support
Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak

Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”

Vox called Joe [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it” while National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.
Joe's growing coalition is bringing together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/Joe.png] Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress (Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads ).
An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.

Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] . Check out JoeSestak.com [https://www.joesestak.com] .

Wednesday, September 25 at 5:30 p.m.
at The Law Offices of Michael T. Van Der Veen
17219 Spruce Street
Philadelphia, PA 19107

Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250

To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092519]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com [reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0beccb6d-77d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349/00742ff0-33d6-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc0MmZmMC0zM2Q2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ozXlRqLMsPPmwpObyzsLjFNyNApE1PlkjgVbkr7Wxlg=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Last night's debate
body:
I know more about health care policy than all of these candidates combined.
Everyone,
Last night, I watched the Democrat presidential debate. There were some funny moments, like when Andrew Yang told us, "I am Asian, so I know a lot of doctors." This show would have been entertaining, if the ideas being discussed were not so dangerous.

John F. Kennedy challenged and inspired us by asking "Ask not what your country can do for you - ask what you can do for your country," Today's Democrats seem to believe he got it backwards, and competed to see who could spend and borrow more money to give away more "free" government benefits.

I know more about health care policy than all of these candidates combined. Some are lying, some are confused, but all are deceiving the American people. President Obama (falsely) promised us we could keep our health care plans if we liked them. Today's Democrats may disagree on their timing and their candor, but they all seem to want to take away our ability to choose and keep private health insurance.

Biden at least reversed himself and now agrees with President Trump that China and its theft of our intellectual property do pose a serious threat.

These are dangerous times - 60% of Democrats want a nominee even more liberal than President Obama. Please help America Next continue to develop and fight for conservative policies that will help America win the next century.

[https://secure.anedot.com/americanext/c1e956397fe7d1ecf9fdb](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=88ac5717365b4560901ee3bda02a2da9&_e=2KqtozVGgnL_bj1-ex0pgRmq7dEAypHw96WY5YVFSPnoNjzM1qvSMH7ekFtXgaVEOjLG3AjVA5ZnhxTKM2vGl2NpPgh_cmmOF0Q_2ZrqPAp1deqOPgbW8ARtfb5i6fmIyEftZ_IJrpczdbO5uhCAof1FFx3XF8lh-5-4pDTgeyQjPpoXoE1mh3xX3PQ5WQ_DS4el0WLZIX5q1326YdCEQ8WrMdBStmHxd286RkiiU4vT55h5xFWKD5e7UM0b00IrO08WZ-z4sP07wgz6Pv_mmNx1hGyemWFC1-iQDAmj5GAyMEAfDL3BX6bT6I1pWF4gIskNzTRydUkDx7AyECyeEtZkoppVBdJF6g38z3yUfdjhKHgcqDHYWOsmmviGp_03Ex8rLBgdmeFMQjq5-ScADA%3D%3D)

Bobby

If you would like to be removed from this email list, [please use this link](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=88ac5717365b4560901ee3bda02a2da9&_t=6x8Y9C4Pr7CZvuuCk8P_Dy2dZ8OyF5CkryrdYzV8fGQH9waBGWqmTajYehqtpl4elxn3pQiXxRC7jfEQsTh22lD4POyfFB7RBEzY98tphpGSwBDL1SrZkwuc3NpfghOJeJ53ySTQm5c2xP-XhvUe2J9TMOUKkCd0igrFOT5irWA%3D).

name: Pamela Tucker
subject: They’re going to take your guns.
body:
Derek, Did you watch last night’s Democrat debate? Failed Senate candidate Beto O’Rourke declared that _“Hell yes, we’re going to take your AR-15.”_ [](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ0MTQ0NzM1MDk0ODM4NDg1JmM9bzBuNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzY4ODk5MTImZD1zOHE2YTJo.M8nLsImcma2El3Qf-zzjcYF_PPvnics_hns4zsCCbJM) Unsurprisingly, **NO ONE** pushed back on Beto’s massively unconstitutional gun confiscation scheme. New Hampshire is constantly labeled as a key swing state for the 2020 election, and if any one of the Democrats running win, the Second Amendment will lose. name: Jason Yates
subject: Urgent Action Needed
body:
| | Peter, For years, faith-based organizations have been prohibited from contracting with the federal government because of their religious beliefs. The government also prevented them from only hiring people who agree with their religious beliefs. However, under President Trump’s administration, The Department of Labor has proposed a [new rule](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=YXreCFi7GI1lUhCRB9TDl7qnh4Vi84yx-NQbna50ukXRUrvhvwE_FxKv2Yi7K9aNWHuulwQV3CHktqzh7Qa3v1zFoqpCfu8ZDSsiPcCo_cA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=1) that would reverse this practice and allow faith-based organizations to contract with the federal government while also allowing them to remain true to their religious convictions in their hiring process. **This new rule has yet to be finalized, and it is critical that you voice your support while it is under public consideration until September 16.** Please take a few minutes to [use our easy tool and send a message to the Acting Secretary of Labor, Patrick Pizzella](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=tERu_zD2Ude52JyIiTcd_riapQqKU7EysHR9Rudhtkk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=2), expressing your support for this new rule and the protection of religious freedom in America. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=tERu_zD2Ude52JyIiTcd_riapQqKU7EysHR9Rudhtkk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=3) After you take action, please forward this email message to your friends and family and encourage them to voice their support for this important new rule. And then take a moment to pray for the continued protection of religious freedom in our great country. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=4)
---

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190913p2a01&n=8)

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins just announced that if she wins reelection, she'd vote for Mitch McConnell as Senate Majority Leader.
body:
We can't let them win.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c16/4bef7a87/68b89a8f/287f02bb/1434362408/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**No wonder he had this to say about her race:**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c16/4bef7a87/68b89a8f/287f02ba/1434362408/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190913-full")

**That 's why he'll spend whatever it takes to keep this Senate seat. We can't let them win:**
[**Rush a $3 donation to Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate. | Friend, **Last night's Democratic debate revealed five key differences between the socialist Democratic Party and our commonsense Republican Party:**
1. Democrats prioritize their socialist dreams ahead of our free market, American values.
2. Democrats plan to raise your taxes so that they can give away more and more “free stuff.” Meanwhile, we’re fighting to let you keep more of what you earn.
3. They’re committed to tearing down every mile of President Trump’s border wall, because they would rather be “politically correct” than secure the border.
4. While our campaign goes door-to-door to ask for your vote and hear your concerns, they’re committed to going door-to-door to confiscate your firearms – even the antique firearms your grandfather gave you.
5. Democrats are accountable to Hollywood, Manhattan, and George Soros. **Meanwhile, I’m accountable to you and all of North Carolina's 13th district.**

[**Will you stand with me? Pitch in today.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ0MTk1ODY5OTQzNjY2MTEyJmM9cDF5NCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzY5MTg1MDAmZD1iM2gwYzBt.w9nLKZ4egrCA5ZbJsAjla11zCR3eIkMUaxnbsQyIARQ) Ted

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We must stop this abuse of power, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
First, President Trump abused his power by ignoring Congress and declaring a false national emergency in order to fund his ineffective wall on our southern border.
Now, he is robbing funds designated for crucial military projects across the country. We cannot allow this to stand, Peter. Congress and the American people have rejected President Trump's wall. Enough is enough.
**[Add your name now to join me in the fight to stop President Trump's abuse of power as he diverts funding from our armed forces to fund his ineffective border wall.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c39/42ab3cf4/61d86b3d/135d7972/262503829/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-president-trump-s-abuse-of-power?source=em190913&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
This week, as the top Democrat on the Senate Committee that funds our Defense Department, I tried to amend a Pentagon spending bill in order to block President Trump from diverting additional funding meant for service members and their families to his wall.
I will continue to do everything I can do to defend our values and stop President Trump's power grab, but I need your support, Peter. Are you with me in this crucial fight?
**[Sign on now if you're opposed to President Trump diverting funds from our military to pay for his misguided campaign promise of a wall on our southern border.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c39/42ab3cf4/61d86b3d/135d7972/262503829/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-president-trump-s-abuse-of-power?source=em190913&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c39/42ab3cf4/61d86b3d/135d7972/262503829/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-president-trump-s-abuse-of-power?source=em190913&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Last night was great. Maybe it was home field advantage in Texas. I just
felt so encouraged by all the texts, the donations, the tweets. I’m so
grateful you’re all in this with us.

Almost the minute I walked off stage, Cynthia came over and said, “Beto,
the fundraising is going so well. We just had our best hour of the
quarter.” It was so great to hear, and much needed heading into this big
FEC deadline.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33711?refcode=ema20190913-54929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0 ]Now we’ve got to keep up this momentum and energy. If you haven’t
already, or if you can again, please make a donation to our campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33711?refcode=ema20190913-54929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0 ]Donate $3 now

All the donations we are raising today will help us put out an FEC
fundraising report that shows the strength, depth, and viability of this
campaign

But it’s more than that. When you donate or volunteer, you are sending a
message that you’re tired of politics as usual. We haven’t taken a poll on
a single issue. I have no idea how an assault weapons buyback polls — it
doesn’t matter. We’re going to do what’s right, not what’s politically
convenient.

Going forward, we’ll keep telling the truth. On guns, on immigration, or
health care, we’re not going to be shy. We’re going to play offense for
the things we believe, not defense. And the best way to press our case is
from a position of strength, which is why building on our fundraising
matters so much now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33711?refcode=ema20190913-54929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0 ]If this is the kind of campaign you want to be part of, make a
donation right now and let’s show how strong we are heading into this next
FEC fundraising deadline.

Again, thank you. Thank you for coming out to our town halls and rallies.
Thank you for making that $5, $10, or $15 donation. Thank you for hosting
an event at your house. Thank you for believing that, in this moment of
consequence, we can build a new kind of politics together.

I couldn’t be more pumped to be in this with people like you.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33711?refcode=ema20190913-54929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0 ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190913footer&t=1023&refcode2=54929_444211_rXv2n0&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=54929%2E444211%2ErXv2n0

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

We just had our best hour of the quarter.” It was so great to hear, and much needed heading into this big FEC deadline. [ ]Now we’ve got to keep up this momentum and energy. If you haven’t already, or if you can again, please make a donation to our campaign. [ ]Donate $3 now All the donations we are raising today will help us put out an FEC fundraising report that shows the strength, depth, and viability of this campaign But it’s more than that. When you donate or volunteer, you are sending a message that you’re tired of politics as usual. We haven’t taken a poll on a single issue. I have no idea how an assault weapons buyback polls — it doesn’t matter. We’re going to do what’s right, not what’s politically convenient. Going forward, we’ll keep telling the truth. On guns, on immigration, or health care, we’re not going to be shy. We’re going to play offense for the things we believe, not defense. And the best way to press our case is from a position of strength, which is why building on our fundraising matters so much now. [ ]If this is the kind of campaign you want to be part of, make a donation right now and let’s show how strong we are heading into this next FEC fundraising deadline. Again, thank you. Thank you for coming out to our town halls and rallies. Thank you for making that $5, $10, or $15 donation. Thank you for hosting an event at your house. Thank you for believing that, in this moment of consequence, we can build a new kind of politics together. I couldn’t be more pumped to be in this with people like you. Beto [ ]Contribute Contribute to Beto's campaign:

| Friend,
At an event we held in Staten Island on Monday, Sean told the crowd that "We need 18 seats to win back the majority. You don't take it back without winning NY 11."
We're building the team we need to win this race and do our part to take back Republican control of the House of Representatives from it's "real" leader, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and [stop her spread of socialism](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tk_e5tOKvBxMdzh1FyyoO4d49WRTdTBQ2b0k0jlJVxtJRRDIKeBOYG6z1Am-bZVU-k0eTq6nls9GV4g3JwCCAp0rNwR4_lYnFW-y-os3TUHPzrae4kDNJDu_TLR1fUmVellDQoWVHc6A8qH4l2aumIGFACOKnVBKFUkvfBu3G_-boEjcPe_tPIEiPcR8Zwraqzee23gtEGtclH7w0DSF1wEvw07z9gdnqMjGgII5Fnq9nTPUUD7QKNaXPX2cSShTrzYghQX19v_OAE2yO2Pi20EHhLIRD2hG-aw32e3qstZhPrfyhW7pEpLn6FE3kOyS&c=D_5dpFSgARbyAXM24HvS3euGNg0HvnYaau021zON-NNpYXYZ8ynCWg==&ch=xIcz5W4LdOqftX2ZaWt9vCK1p53ZuiR9yaet-Co4zmkmgzkxXXvy9A==).
It's not only important for the nation. It's important locally. New York is under one party rule at both the city and state levels and, currently, there is no conservative voice representing our city in Washington.

name: Erica Borsack
subject: Why this quarter matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Right now, our campaign is just a few weeks out from our first ever FEC deadline. I wanted to touch base with you to explain why this is a make or break moment for us.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9914642/98794148/33231869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDNkZmJlNi02MmQ2LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeYPj2hYz_Qi-2Kdn7541iLV1Vv76mjguEDfGBeWAKc=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.13_b1_eb_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1)
---
| Hi Peter,

Right now, our campaign is just a few weeks out from our first ever FEC deadline. I wanted to touch base with you to explain why this is a make or break moment for us.

As you might already know, campaigns like ours are required to file reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) on a quarterly basis. These reports reflect all the financial happenings with our campaign. This includes a breakdown on how much we’re spending and how much we’re raising -- all of which will be open record to Ross Spano and the outside special interests who will dump major funds into our race to defend their yes man.

**Since this will be our first filing of the 2020 cycle, it’s so important that we have the strongest possible showing.** We need to show that we’ve got the grassroots support right out of the gate to prove that Adam is the candidate ready to unseat Spano and fend off his dark money buddies.

[**If you’re ready to flip FL-15 and elect a tried and true public servant like Adam to fight for us, we’ll need your support ahead of this deadline. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Moscow Mitch shutters the FEC just in time for the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The number of remaining Federal Election Commission (FEC) commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible, opening the door for campaigns to ignore finance regulations and accept endless amounts of money without fear of repercussions. Foreign governments will have an easier time interfering in the 2020 presidential elections, and GOP dark money will flow freely. This is no accident \-- it's part of a carefully orchestrated assault on democracy by national Republicans, specifically #MoscowMitch McConnell. He's the one who has stood in the way of campaign finance reform, spearheaded the Citizens United case, and blocked any new appointments to the FEC. He is actively tearing down every protection that props up our democracy and even standing in the way of election protections that would stop Russia from meddling in 2020. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. [**If every person reading this email gave just $1, we could give the GOP a run for their corporate PAC money in 2020. Can you help us save the FEC and repair the damage Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all the Republicans have done to our democracy by donating $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7b/6e9863e8/14acd810/1db0c7dc/3556220570/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190913a.ND&refcode2=d7OiZbZ2XxnQ0uN5ZEqv") Thank you for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7b/6e9863e8/14acd810/1db0c623/3556220570/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190913a.ND&refcode2=d7OiZbZ2XxnQ0uN5ZEqv")

name: [Action Needed]
subject: back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Hey Peter - Mike has already hit the ground running with Congress back in session. He's already hosted a forum pressing for action on gun violence prevention legislation already passed by the House, and now he needs us to stand with him.

[Will you sign on here and call on the Senate to vote on background checks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/PxO3CifMgPCQF270UvDDS_ksTx1ZGX_7ygg3hqCqjvA=)

Begin Forwarded Message:
> Peter - Congress is back in session, and my House Democratic colleagues and I are already getting right back to work advancing the People's Agenda.
>
> **_And an important part of that agenda is universal background checks on all firearm sales._**
>
> I'm proud to have introduced this bill, but since it was passed in the House, Mitch McConnell has refused to even bring it to a vote in the Senate. Americans want a commonsense solution to gun violence, so we must send a clear message now.
>
> [Tell the Senate to make our communities safer and vote on universal background checks! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/PxO3CifMgPCQF270UvDDS_ksTx1ZGX_7ygg3hqCqjvA=)
>
> **[DEMAND ACTION](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/PxO3CifMgPCQF270UvDDS_ksTx1ZGX_7ygg3hqCqjvA=?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)**
> Our bipartisan bill has widespread public support. The American people are demanding action to help save lives, but McConnell won't budge.
>
> **With Congress back in session, this is the perfect opportunity to renew our call to action.** [Add your name right away and join us in demanding the Senate vote on universal background checks.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/PxO3CifMgPCQF270UvDDS_ksTx1ZGX_7ygg3hqCqjvA=)
>
> We can't let our communities continue to be harmed by senseless gun violence.
>
> Thanks for making your voice heard.
>
> Mike
>
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/PxO3CifMgPCQF270UvDDS_ksTx1ZGX_7ygg3hqCqjvA=)
> * * *
> _Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/bJKo7QTLD5id2Wd8D81VaDzkRL_zYf69ZjyRHByQkVY=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_90DO_190913_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_
>
> _We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7d-hRbHeMbUt4YygrRrELhIELGYOCaszowQOchHTt-g=/umpiAJmBFKyyhyaeAS_Qys4Q7XjcNH_z5OrRG_Frmj4=)_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Did you see Francis' message?

Our district is now only one of two in the whole country won by Hillary Clinton that Republicans still control.

**[Rush a donation now to help us win in 2020 and ensure that Central New York is served by someone who cares more about people than big-money donors!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Rush+a+donation+now+to+help+us+win+in+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2")

Begin forwarded message from Francis Conole:** [](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") This week, extreme Republican Dan Bishop was elected to Congress in North Carolina.

Bishop will be a rubber stamp vote for the worst of Trump's agenda. He stands against protecting the Affordable Care Act, will likely support Trump's plan to steal money from the military to build his useless wall, and will be a reliable vote for special interests.

_This loss only underscores how important our mission is. NY-24 is one of only two seats won by Hillary Clinton that Republicans still control!_

[**Will you donate now to help fully fund our mission to defeat John Katko and flip NY-24 blue? We need $5,500 by midnight Friday to stay on track.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+donate+now+to+help+fully+fund+o&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2")
---|---|---
[$100](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+100&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") | [$250](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=250&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+250&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2") | [Other](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Other&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2")
Dan McCready, who lost to Bishop in NC-09, is also a veteran and put up a long fight to win this special election. We both have an ethic of service deep in our bones.

Politics is often presented in the media as a game, but real lives are at stake every day, and the decisions made in Washington affect us all.

That's why it's so important that our democracy represents the needs of the people. That starts with electing representatives like me who are more interested in serving the families of central New York than enriching big-money donors.

[**Pitch in what you can before midnight tomorrow to help us build our campaign from the ground up!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-sept19?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Pitch+in+what+you+can+before+midnight+to&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190913_1_2")

Yours in service,

Francis

|

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. clean_body: | | | Did you see Francis' message? Our district is now only one of two in the whole country won by Hillary Clinton that Republicans still control. "" Begin forwarded message from Francis Conole: "" This week, extreme Republican Dan Bishop was elected to Congress in North Carolina. Bishop will be a rubber stamp vote for the worst of Trump's agenda. He stands against protecting the Affordable Care Act, will likely support Trump's plan to steal money from the military to build his useless wall, and will be a reliable vote for special interests. This loss only underscores how important our mission is. NY-24 is one of only two seats won by Hillary Clinton that Republicans still control! "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page. | "" | "" | "" ---|---|--- "" | "" | "" Dan McCready, who lost to Bishop in NC-09, is also a veteran and put up a long fight to win this special election. We both have an ethic of service deep in our bones. Politics is often presented in the media as a game, but real lives are at stake every day, and the decisions made in Washington affect us all. That's why it's so important that our democracy represents the needs of the people. That starts with electing representatives like me who are more interested in serving the families of central New York than enriching big-money donors. "" Yours in service, Francis |

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: This number went up for the FIRST time in 10 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is horrifying: For the first time since the Affordable Care Act was implemented, the number of uninsured Americans WENT UP.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190913hcenrollment-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") **_New York Times_** : The share of uninsured Americans increased in 2018 for the first time since Obamacare took full effect, despite a strong economy. **[Stop the GOP attacks on health care. Pitch in $10 to save Minnesota's Senate seat and re-elect Tina Smith>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190913hcenrollment-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Friend,

This is urgent: For the first time since the Affordable Care Act was implemented, **the number of uninsured Americans WENT UP.**

We know this is directly tied to Trump and McConnell's efforts to dismantle the ACA. Trump and the GOP keep finding more ways to undermine the law, drive up the cost of care and prescriptions, and kick more people off the insurance rolls.

And we know these attacks are going to keep coming.

Tina is fighting in the Senate for everyone to access the health care they need -- regardless of income, race, gender, pre-existing conditions, or anything else. And she's ready to keep standing up to anyone who tries to take away your health care.

**But right now our campaign to re-elect her is short of our fundraising goals. We need to keep up a strong pace so Tina can keep fighting for all of us.**

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Tell Congress: Act on Climate Change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc389/2a380d31/3dbc1d2e/f0dcfc/1088917868/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc389/2a380d31/3dbc1d2e/f0dcfc/1088917868/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team,
When it comes to issues like our environment, our economy, and our national security, climate change is one of the single biggest threats we face -- and we're running out of time to address it.
Senator Hassan is working to stem the tide, but with a Republican majority in the Senate and Donald Trump in the White House, she needs your help to turn up the pressure.
[**Will you please add your name to call on Congress to take meaningful action on climate change before it 's too late?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc389/2a380d31/3dbc1d2e/f0dcfd/1088917868/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ActionOnClimateNow/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2019_climateja%3Frefcode%3De20190913_climateja_all%26recurring%3Dauto")
We're seeing new record temperatures, extreme weather is devastating our communities, and both ocean temperatures and sea levels are on the rise. This isn't a coincidence, and we need to act swiftly. **Inaction from the President and Republicans in Congress could be catastrophic.**
We need your help to send a critically important message, everyone: Add your name to tell Congress to take action to top climate catastrophe before it's too late.
Thank you,
Team Maggie

clean_body: "" "" Team, When it comes to issues like our environment, our economy, and our national security, climate change is one of the single biggest threats we face -- and we're running out of time to address it. Senator Hassan is working to stem the tide, but with a Republican majority in the Senate and Donald Trump in the White House, she needs your help to turn up the pressure. "" We're seeing new record temperatures, extreme weather is devastating our communities, and both ocean temperatures and sea levels are on the rise. This isn't a coincidence, and we need to act swiftly. Inaction from the President and Republicans in Congress could be catastrophic. We need your help to send a critically important message, everyone: Add your name to tell Congress to take action to top climate catastrophe before it's too late. Thank you, Team Maggie ""

name: Rita Hart
subject: Thanks for joining the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
You may have heard the whispers, and now I'm excited to officially say it out loud:
[](http://act.myngp.com/Forms/-9075959137532179456?)
---
| Peter, I'm excited and proud to say it: **I 'm running to represent Iowa's 2nd district in Congress!** Dave Loebsack has served our district so well for over a decade, and I have been proud to call him my representative. Now, with the announcement of his retirement, our community needs someone who will continue his hard work and service to Iowa. Rep. Leobsack was a constant presence in our district. He listened, and I'm ready to listen too. **[Can you take a moment to share with me what's on your mind? Which issues are the most important to you right now?](http://act.myngp.com/Forms/-9075959137532179456?)** I've spent my life serving others, as a daughter in a family of 8, then as a teacher and finally, as a state Senator. But my first love has and will always be my farm. I grew up with a big family in a small, agricultural town. These days, I continue my family's business by running my own farm with my husband. For too long, I've watched as opportunity and access have dwindled for our rural areas. That's why we need a farmer's voice in Congress. **[This is one of my top priorities, but I want to know about yours. What do you want to see happen in Congress for Iowa's 2nd district?](http://act.myngp.com/Forms/-9075959137532179456?)** Iowa's hardworking men and women deserve a resounding voice in Washington who will listen to their needs and then put those needs first, every single time. The fight for our future starts today. Talk soon,
Rita Hart [](http://act.myngp.com/Forms/-9075959137532179456?)

| _**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator, and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District.**_

[**Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Rita 's campaign? >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hart_q22019?refcode=website-intro&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2800) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hart_q22019?refcode=website-intro&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2800)
---

| Rita Hart is a candidate for Congress in Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, visit [RitaHart.com](http://www.RitaHart.com).
---
| Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Nadler’s unhealthy obsession with President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Chairman Jerry Nadler and the Democrats on the House Judiciary Committee have an unhealthy obsession with President Trump and they just ran a circus of a hearing. President Trump's entire first term has been an ongoing investigation and even after the Mueller Probe found NO COLLUSION, they are still doing whatever they can to move the impeachment hearings forward.
Take a look:

name: Team Hick
subject: What John said last night:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I'm looking forward to watching tonight's third presidential debate--this time with friends. And I can't wait to hear some great ideas about how we move our country forward. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714ca/691c9bd/6e011636/11a7b63c/217216455/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--John sent you a note yesterday before the presidential debate in Houston, reflecting on what a real victory in 2020 must look like for Democrats. We wanted to make sure you saw it.

[**_Read his note, then chip in to our grassroots campaign that will take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and his cronies._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190913_TH_20190913-fr-TH-debatetopper-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

\----Begin forwarded message----

**Sender:** John Hickenlooper
**Subject:** A reminder about tonight's debate:
**Date:** September 12, 2019

Friend, I'm looking forward to watching tonight's third presidential debate--this time with friends. And I can't wait to hear some great ideas about how we move our country forward.

But here's a quick reminder: No matter how many good ideas a Democratic president brings to the Oval Office on Day 1, we'll have a hard time getting them done _unless we take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell_.

**That starts with beating Cory Gardner and flipping seats like this one right here in Colorado --that's one reason I'm in this race. And if we all step up, we _can_ get it done. Chip in today.** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190913_TH_20190913-fr-TH-debatetopper-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Khizr Khan
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I am a Gold Star father.

I stood firm as Donald Trump smeared my faith, my family, and my fallen son.

I pledged at that moment I would do everything in my power to defeat him, his Republican Majority, and their policies of division and hate.

That's why I'm emailing you right now.

As I type this, Trump is preparing for a massive rally in New Mexico to attack my friend Ben Ray and flip the state red.

[**_I 'd do anything in my power to keep this critical state in Democrats' hands, strip Trump of every last ounce of power, and end his politics of hate and division -- but I can't do it alone. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190913_em_fr_b1_khan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Our peace, dignity, and prosperity depends on Ben Ray winning to strip Republicans of their Senate majority and stop them from packing our courts with ideologue judges.

[**I 'm asking 175 patriots to send a massive wave of support for Ben Ray before midnight.**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190913_em_fr_b1_khan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

We need leaders like Ben Ray we can trust. Can I count on your $5? | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190913_em_fr_b1_khan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

Khizr Khan

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81cd/97206087/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81c3/97206087/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81c0/97206087/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81c1/97206087/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81c7/97206087/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b3/18e32a7f/52cfeb70/7bfb81c5/97206087/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Tim
subject: Moving forward after last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|

I'm in this race to fight for you, team.

Your kids deserve to go to a good public school, you deserve to have a job that puts food on the table, and you deserve a president that doesn't make you afraid to check the news.

I have been on the ground talking to voters face-to-face about my vision for America as we push to make the next debate.

[**Your support helps us reach those voters. Can you give just $3 so that my common sense message can go further?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Your+support+helps+us+reach+those+voters&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190913_1_1")

In politics, like in life, there's no substitute for hard work. I'm putting in old-fashioned work on the campaign trail -- and people are taking notice.

Everywhere I go, voters are asking how they can get involved in our movement. Our moment is coming, folks, **we just need to keep working.**

name: Pam Northam
subject: Happy birthday, Ralph!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Celebrating 60 years
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d8/39260142/42971455/62639b9a/2560061156/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Today, the Northam family is celebrating a special day for our family -- Ralph's 60th birthday! My husband has spent the past 60 years serving others through his service to our country as an army doctor, our community as a physician, our Commonwealth as a State Senator, Lieutenant Governor, and now Governor, and our family as a loving father and husband. One of the hardest workers I know, he wakes up every day, determined and eager to fight for a Virginia that works for everyone -- no matter who you are or where you live. I could not be more proud of him and what he has accomplished. Over the past several months, Ralph and I have been campaigning for Democratic candidates who share our values because a Democratic majority in the General Assembly will make a real difference to every Virginian. With your help, we can:
* Pass common sense gun safety laws
* Improve access to early childhood education
* Protect women's access to reproductive health care
* Increase pay for hard working Virginians
* Provide equal pay for equal work
* Enact criminal justice reform
* Break down structural racial inequities in our laws

**[I humbly ask you to join me in wishing Ralph a happy birthday, and join our fight by contributing $20, $60, or whatever you're able today!](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d8/39260142/42971455/62639b85/2560061156/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019#")** Thank you for your support. Together, we can secure a Democratic majority this fall and a brighter future for all Virginians. Gratefully, Pam Northam

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from The Way Ahead email list, please [click here.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d8/39260142/42971455/62639b84/2560061156/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://act.ralphnortham.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: PETITION: Pass red flag laws now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, After bloody, senseless violence ripped apart communities across the country this past month, the pressure is mounting for lawmakers across the country to pass meaningful gun control measures that will prevent further violence. Red flag laws allow family members and police to petition a state court to temporarily remove firearms and weapons from someone's possession if they are deemed a danger to themselves or others. Currently, only 17 states and the District of Columbia have laws like this, and we think they need to be nationwide. [**That 's why we're asking you to join us today in calling on lawmakers across the nation to pass red flag laws and protect our communities! We should not live in fear of guns any longer, and passing these laws would be a concrete step toward making that future a reality.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7c/6e9863e8/14ae77fc/1db0c6a1/3439868962/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/fed-red-flag-law/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thanks for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7c/6e9863e8/14ae77fc/1db0c6a1/3439868962/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/fed-red-flag-law/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---

VoteVets -- which was established by Iraq War veterans and represents over 600,000 vets, military families, and civilian supporters -- endorsed James' campaign for Senate.
The national organization commended James' service after 9/11 and his commitment to putting others first, calling him a **" tremendous pick for senator"** who has the **" knowledge and credibility to keep America safe."**
This is great news -- more people are catching on to our campaign and what an incredible candidate James is, and it's all because of our hard work. We need to keep this up so we can spread our message to more supporters, continue to grow our grassroots movement, and help send James to the Senate.
[_**If you believe in James and our campaign, too, make a contribution today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa21c/18d6a294/4cf194c3/26d65231/829755080/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MTN2diIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190913vv?refcode=jme190913vv_nd_other&refcode2=107423")

Team Mackler

name: Ed Markey
subject: Proud to have Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

In the fight to save our planet and unleash a clean energy future, I am proud to partner with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and honored to have her endorsement for re-election.

[](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-aoc-endorsement?refcode=EM-091319_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
I am so fortunate to call Alexandria my friend and colleague, and I am proud to have her support.

We're on the front lines of the fights that define our times.

Every day, I'm taking on Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell to defend our progressive values.

But I can't do that without your help. And reaching our FEC goal will show everyone from the Trump campaign to the naysayers that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality is more powerful than ever.

_**[That's why we must reach our $50,000 FEC deadline goal. Will you pitch in $27 or more to help?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-aoc-endorsement?refcode=EM-091319_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

body:
We need to make sure there's a proven voice for working people on the next debate stage.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c8a/1630b3eb/515c60c3/5f549fe2/3095687631/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qualify?refcode=729_org_em_fr")
Friend,
Despite having ten candidates on stage, something was clearly missing from last night's debate: someone who has actually delivered REAL change for working people.
There are only a few weeks left before the next debate, and we can still make sure that there's a proven voice for working people on that stage next time. Can you pitch in?
**[Contribute $1 today to help beat our projections for mid-September and get closer to qualifying for the October debate.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c8a/1630b3eb/515c60c3/5f549fe2/3095687631/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qualify?refcode=729_org_em_fr")**

The Democratic Party will only win next November by nominating someone who can ensure that it's the party of working people. Someone who will MOTIVATE Americans to get out and vote Trump out of office.
**[Help us reach 1,000 more contributions before midnight Sunday. Contribute $1 right now.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c8a/1630b3eb/515c60c3/5f549fe2/3095687631/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qualify?refcode=729_org_em_fr")**
Bill is the ONLY candidate for president that has proven he can deliver for working people in the biggest city in the country.
Let's get him back up there,
Team de Blasio

clean_body: We need to make sure there's a proven voice for working people on the next debate stage. "" Friend, Despite having ten candidates on stage, something was clearly missing from last night's debate: someone who has actually delivered REAL change for working people. There are only a few weeks left before the next debate, and we can still make sure that there's a proven voice for working people on that stage next time. Can you pitch in? "" "" The Democratic Party will only win next November by nominating someone who can ensure that it's the party of working people. Someone who will MOTIVATE Americans to get out and vote Trump out of office. "" Bill is the ONLY candidate for president that has proven he can deliver for working people in the biggest city in the country. Let's get him back up there, Team de Blasio "" PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: We'll never forget
body:
On Wednesday, the calendar once again read September 11. Eighteen year ago, life changed not just for nearly 3,000 people... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/well-never-forget?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**We'll Never Forget**_
On Wednesday, the calendar once again read September 11. Eighteen years ago, the world changed not just for the Americans who perished that day and their families, but for all people around the world.

It's a day I remember vividly. And it's a day I'll never forget.

And today while we continue to mourn those we lost 18 years ago, my faith that America is the greatest country on Earth is reaffirmed by the stories of heroism that we saw that day, and in the days, months and years that followed.

It's stories of first responders running toward danger, when they knew there was no chance of making it back. It's stories of everyday people like you and me stepping up and helping one another.

I'm so proud to be an American, in part because of this remarkable American spirit. I'll never forget September 11, 2001, and I imagine you never will either.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:**_Chairman Hupfer pauses for a photo with Miami County Chairman (and State Rep.) Ethan Manning and the newest member of the Indiana General Assembly, Senator-elect Stacey Donato. Senator-elect Donato was elected at a caucus of the district's precinct committeemen on Monday night after five ballots. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| _**Japan/Korea 2019:
Taking Indiana to the World & Bringing the World to Indiana!**_
This week, **Governor Holcomb** concluded the first round of this month's economic development trips to Asia, where he met with business and government leaders in Japan and South Korea. During **Governor Holcomb’s** time in Japan he met with leaders of two of Indiana’s largest Japanese companies, Subaru and Honda. Together, those companies (and more than 300 other Japan-based businesses) employ more than 67,000 of Hoosiers!
* **Governor Holcomb** met with executives from Subaru Corporation. Subaru of Indiana Automotive (Lafayette) employs more than 6,000 Hoosiers and has invested over $2.2 billion in its Indiana operations.
* **Governor Holcomb** met with leaders of Honda Motor Company, the parent company of Indiana-based Honda Manufacturing of Indiana (HMIN). HMIN has invested more than $1 billion in its operations in Greensburg and employs more than 2,500 Hoosiers.
* **Governor Holcomb** met with Gunma Governor Ichita Yamamoto to discuss how Indiana can continue to continue to promote future investment opportunities. Gunma prefecture is home to the headquarters of Subaru Corporation.
* **Governor Holcomb** and **First Lady Janet Holcomb** hosted a Friends of Indiana reception to thank business executives, government officials and industry stakeholders for their many contributions to the Indiana-Japan partnership.

To find out more about this trade mission or future trade missions, make sure to follow [@GovHolcomb](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=55ec53c1e4&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [@Indiana_EDC](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=af01617ba3&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Twitter (and keep reading The Party Line each week)!
---
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c25aba1333&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military _**
This year's [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a152d77be4&e=1acd9bb3d6) is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome **Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast **and **Dan Crenshaw** as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own **Congressman Jim Baird** , and you may remember **Congressman Crenshaw **from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's [tweet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdb2ad0c26&e=1acd9bb3d6) "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral.

Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f1efa45837&e=1acd9bb3d6) now!
[\--> Reserve your seat here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=76b59066b4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Just Announced: 2020 Republican State Convention _**
We're excited to announce that the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention is set, and that we're returning to Indianapolis on June 20, 2020!

After going on the road to Evansville in 2018, we'll be returning to Indiana's capital city next year for our biennial convention. At next year's convention, delegates will be voting to nominate our party's candidate for lieutenant governor and attorney general.

Interested in being a convention delegate next year? Make sure that you run to represent your county in the May 2020 primary! More details about the 2020 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will be released in the coming months, so make sure that you keep reading The Party Line!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!_** Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a9aa14ff6&e=1acd9bb3d6), learn about sponsorship opportunities [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b16eb99306&e=1acd9bb3d6), and register to attend the national convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bcf146b3a5&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
