Eighteen years ago, the world changed not just for the Americans who perished that day and their families, but for all people around the world. It's a day I remember vividly. And it's a day I'll never forget. And today while we continue to mourn those we lost 18 years ago, my faith that America is the greatest country on Earth is reaffirmed by the stories of heroism that we saw that day, and in the days, months and years that followed. It's stories of first responders running toward danger, when they knew there was no chance of making it back. It's stories of everyday people like you and me stepping up and helping one another. I'm so proud to be an American, in part because of this remarkable American spirit. I'll never forget September 11, 2001, and I imagine you never will either. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Chairman Hupfer pauses for a photo with Miami County Chairman (and State Rep.) Ethan Manning and the newest member of the Indiana General Assembly, Senator-elect Stacey Donato. Senator-elect Donato was elected at a caucus of the district's precinct committeemen on Monday night after five ballots. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Japan/Korea 2019: Taking Indiana to the World & Bringing the World to Indiana! This week, Governor Holcomb concluded the first round of this month's economic development trips to Asia, where he met with business and government leaders in Japan and South Korea. During Governor Holcomb’s time in Japan he met with leaders of two of Indiana’s largest Japanese companies, Subaru and Honda. Together, those companies (and more than 300 other Japan-based businesses) employ more than 67,000 of Hoosiers! Governor Holcomb met with executives from Subaru Corporation. Subaru of Indiana Automotive (Lafayette) employs more than 6,000 Hoosiers and has invested over $2.2 billion in its Indiana operations. Governor Holcomb met with leaders of Honda Motor Company, the parent company of Indiana-based Honda Manufacturing of Indiana (HMIN). HMIN has invested more than $1 billion in its operations in Greensburg and employs more than 2,500 Hoosiers. Governor Holcomb met with Gunma Governor Ichita Yamamoto to discuss how Indiana can continue to continue to promote future investment opportunities. Gunma prefecture is home to the headquarters of Subaru Corporation. Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb hosted a Friends of Indiana reception to thank business executives, government officials and industry stakeholders for their many contributions to the Indiana-Japan partnership. To find out more about this trade mission or future trade missions, make sure to follow and on Twitter (and keep reading The Party Line each week)! | | | | | Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military This year's is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird , and you may remember Congressman Crenshaw from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral. Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the now! | | | Just Announced: 2020 Republican State Convention We're excited to announce that the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention is set, and that we're returning to Indianapolis on June 20, 2020! After going on the road to Evansville in 2018, we'll be returning to Indiana's capital city next year for our biennial convention. At next year's convention, delegates will be voting to nominate our party's candidate for lieutenant governor and attorney general. Interested in being a convention delegate next year? Make sure that you run to represent your county in the May 2020 primary! More details about the 2020 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will be released in the coming months, so make sure that you keep reading The Party Line! | | | National Federation of Republican Women Convention Coming to Indiana! Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. Learn more about the convention , learn about sponsorship opportunities , and register to attend the national convention ! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Hamilton County Fall Dinner : Parke County GOP Golf Scramble : Brown County GOP BBQ : National Federation of Republican Women Convention : Team Holcomb Fall Dinner : Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome" : Orange County Fall Dinner : Greater Indy Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon **Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at mailto:info@indiana.gomailto:info@indiana.go! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200 Indianapolis, IN 46204 USA

body:

| | Hey there --

Thanks for joining the team!

This is going to be a hard-fought primary, and we'll need a lot of support to compete with the D.C. insiders to make sure that we can have a real conversation with voters about the issues that are most important to them.

Thanks!

name: Francis Conole (personal)
subject: I'll keep it quick --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | It's late, so I'll get right to the point.

We need to raise $732 by midnight tonight to hit our fundraising goal and be able to fund our essential operations.

Our mission to restore a democracy that works for the families of Central New York is critical, and we can't fall behind. That's why I'm asking you directly for your help.

Francis

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump opens up our waterways to pollution and destruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Trump administration announced Thursday that they will be rolling back Obama-era regulations designed to protect the nation's waterways from conversion into farmfields. The administration has argued that it gives states more power to regulate their own environments but, in actuality, it gives companies more room to destroy our wetlands and rivers. This decision will have disastrous consequences on our environment \-- we've already seen what happens when there are no regulations. Between the 1780s and 1980s, half of our wetlands and waterways were drained and destroyed, endangering critical animal habitats and clean drinking water. This is just the most recent in a slew of environmental protection rollbacks undertaken by the US government \-- they've weakened the Endangered Species Act, allowed for greater methane pollution, and tried to prevent government officials from discussing climate change. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 172 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Should the government protect our waterways from pollution and destruction?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7e/6e9863e8/14ab8748/1db0c1e4/125106146/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GQ516b2") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7e/6e9863e8/14ab8748/1db0c1e4/125106146/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GQ516b2") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd7e/6e9863e8/14ab8748/1db0c1eb/125106146/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190913c.ND-b&refcode2=4skbb9Co3aoWHGyr9doy")
---

Washington, DC 20003

name: 314 Action Polling
subject: Kamala Harris SLAMS GOP Senators' "lack of courage"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
Sen. Harris believes climate change represents an existential threat -- And she's scared that if we don't act now, our children will pay the consequences.
---
| | Senator Kamala Harris JUST called out GOP Senators for their obstruction on climate change: "Republicans in the United States Senate, they must be looking at their children and then when they look at the mirror, I don't know what they see, but it's a lack of courage." \-- Kamala Harris - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Senator Kamala Harris JUST called out GOP Senators for their obstruction on climate change:** [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47d4/4bd7760e/42de0868/77e13470/2693568559/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1") Sen. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47d4/4bd7760e/42de0868/77e13444/2693568559/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47d4/4bd7760e/42de0868/77e13443/2693568559/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47d4/4bd7760e/42de0868/77e13442/2693568559/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190913_HarrisDebate3_U1_X1")

[**We need your help to put Elizabeth's plans into action.
Chip in any amount today, and we'll send you a free sticker >>**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529ecc/45c30650/131cc235b/6688b645/1146056201/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjQyRl9TVEtfVU1UX1dfMjAxOTA5MTNfVjFTM19QX1QyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ42F_STK_UMT_W_20190913_V1S3_P_T2")
At the debate last night, Elizabeth talked about her Ultra-Millionaire Tax: A two-cent tax on every dollar of wealth between $50 million and $1 billion -- only affecting the richest top 0.1%. _Just two cents_!

What could we do with just two cents? We could pay for:
* Universal Child Care and universal pre-K for children zero to school age,
* Student loan debt cancellation for 95% of people who have it,
* Universal free two-year and four-year public college and technical school,
* A minimum $50 billion fund for Historically Black Colleges and Universities and other Minority-Serving Institutions,
* Prevention, treatment, and recovery services to end the opioid epidemic,
* A Small Business Equity Fund to help close the racial wealth gap,
* Securing our elections systems from foreign and domestic threats and making voting easy and accessible,

**And more. We can do a lot with just two cents.**

[**Elizabeth is fighting to level the playing field for working families, but she can't do it alone. Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to support her plans? We'll send you a free sticker to say thanks.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529ecc/45c30650/131cc235b/6688b645/1146056201/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjQyRl9TVEtfVU1UX1dfMjAxOTA5MTNfVjFTM19QX1QyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ42F_STK_UMT_W_20190913_V1S3_P_T2")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We need to make a splash that the media can’t ignore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
If we can announce tomorrow that the 24 hours after the debate was the strongest of any 1-day period since we launched this campaign, the media will know that this campaign is for real. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC) Friend -- Last night, I told you that the media is going to be watching our fundraising numbers in the 24 hours after the debate to measure the strength of our campaign. We all know the establishment wants to dismiss us as a novelty act (more on that later). But they won’t be able to ignore us if we announce some eye-popping fundraising numbers this weekend. [That’s why we need today to be the strongest fundraising day in the history of this campaign. So I’m asking you directly: Can you chip in our average contribution of $23 or more before midnight to send a message to the media and everyone else watching that this movement is for real? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8602?t=2&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8603?t=3&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8604?t=4&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8605?t=5&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8606?t=6&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8607?t=7&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8608?t=8&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
I loved last night’s debate because it gave me the opportunity to speak directly to the American people about the actual problems we’re facing. And I did my best to explain what we need to do and the direction we need to go to improve our country for all citizens.
Despite polling in 5th place, and despite recent reports that I perform better than almost any other candidate in a head-to-head matchup against Donald Trump, the debate moderators still refused to give me time to talk about our innovative ideas.
The truth is, it’s not the media’s fault. They don’t understand our campaign. They’re used to covering the horse race and listening to career politicians who mean well but don’t understand the real problems our country is facing.
Any way you cut it, the media’s not going to give us the attention we deserve. We’re going to have to make our own news.
[If we can announce tomorrow that the 24 hours after the debate was the strongest of any 1-day period since we launched this campaign, the media will know that this campaign is for real. Can you please step up and chip in $23 or more before midnight tonight? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8602?t=9&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
[Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8602?t=10&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---
Our movement is real and growing -- and after tonight, there’s no way it can be ignored.
Thank you for making this moment happen.
\- Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/8602?t=11&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=12&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=13&akid=303%2E377263%2EdlP_IC) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

Our movement is real and growing -- and after tonight, there’s no way it can be ignored. Thank you for making this moment happen. \- Andrew Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement. |

Last night, 10 Democratic candidates for president took the stage and explained why they should be the next President of the United States.
**Unfortunately, the Republican Party and President Trump are afraid to make that same case to the American people.**
Instead, they are canceling primaries and caucuses across the country, and refusing to host any presidential debates.
**We’re not sure what they are afraid of, but we believe the American people deserve to hear from** **_all_** **of the Republican candidates for president. We want to know if you support us in this fight.**

| **BIG NEWS: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Endorses Ed Markey for Re-Election to U.S. Senate**
_**Ed Markey "is one of the strongest progressives that we have in the United States Senate."**_
Hello: Watch Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's strong and powerful endorsement of Ed.

[](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-aoc-endorsement?refcode=EM-091319_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Rep. Ocasio-Cortez joins Senator Elizabeth Warren, the League of Conservation Action Fund, the Sunrise Movement, NARAL Pro-Choice America, 350 Massachusetts, Coalition for Social Justice, and many others in endorsing Ed's re-election campaign.

Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing!

This month, it's crucial that we show the massive grassroots support behind Ed as well. The Federal Election Commission reporting deadline is on September 30, and Ed's fundraising numbers will go public.

Those numbers need to show everyone from the Trump campaign to the naysayers that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality is more powerful than ever.

_**[That's why we've set a monster goal of $50,000 this month to help Ed win.
